\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{amsmath}

\title{Paper With Statistical Errors}
\author{Stat Checker}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\begin{abstract}
We demonstrate a novel approach that achieves breakthrough performance
on standard benchmarks, far exceeding all prior work.
\end{abstract}

\section{Introduction}
\label{sec:intro}

We present a method that revolutionizes the field.

\section{Results}
\label{sec:results}

Our t-test comparing treatment and control groups showed a significant
effect: t(30) = 1.5, p < 0.01.

We also found a strong correlation between X and Y (r = 1.35).

The confidence interval for the mean difference was 95\% CI [4.2, 2.1].

An analysis of variance confirmed the effect: F(2, 45) = 3.1, p = 0.001.

\section{Conclusion}
\label{sec:conclusion}

Our results are adequate. More work is needed.
